message:
fix(core): resolve workspace build errors in mission lifecycle types

Add transition_lifecycle method to Mission, extend transition table with
Paused state and new transition kinds (PlanFinalized, DispatchStarted,
ExecutionStarted, ExecutionBlocked, RetryResumed, MissionCancelled),
fix dispatch method return types to use MissionDispatch* variants, add
Executing to non-exhaustive matches, and add missing description field
to TxStep test initializers.

Reduces workspace build errors from 22 to 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
